_doc: Anchor #2: Rook in his default mood with three populated memories from a recent visitor exchange. Probes whether the LLM weaves a memory hint into the drift narrate naturally vs. forcing one in.
name: rook_content_with_memories
npc_seed: the forge-keeper; slow-moving and quiet; hums old songs while working the bellows, sleeves always a little sooty
memories: the visitor said: tell me about the iron you're working today
Rook said: this batch came from the river bend; takes a softer hand than the highland ore.
the visitor said: thank you for showing me
